LanguageData.Seg_WOTV_RogueTraderTitle_LetterBody: .{PAWN_labelShort} has received the sacred Warrant of Trade from {FACTION_name}!/nThis Warrant grants {PAWN_labelShort} the title of Rogue Trader, granting Imperial right of settlement and ownership of this very rimworld./nA new heir can be chosen by selecting your Warrant of Trade.
